title: Fix various lint issues
body:
Lint failures on macOS slow down other work.

We also, _occasionally_, get a lint warning in `pkg/manifests` (e.g. commit https://github.com/containers/container-libs/commit/36a4061f0966723c06a97b697e4772198cea4772 ). Shut that one up as well.

See individual commit messages for details.
